title: Due Scheduling, Monotonic Clocks, Backoff, Jitter, and Pause Policy · Goroutine Forensics
summary: A preserved Go feed-service run contains one plausible discovery, URL, XML, normalization, fetch, SQL, transaction, lease, goroutine, handler, accessibility, migration, or release defect; locate the first failed invariant before editing. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in deterministic adaptive polling scheduler and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evi…
objectives: Persist next attempt, last success, failure streak, publisher hints, pause state, and scheduling reason independently from process memory.
Inject wall and monotonic time roles, define inclusive due comparisons, and test forward, backward, and boundary changes.
Apply bounded exponential backoff with deterministic-testable jitter, reset rules, Retry-After, and maximum staleness escalation.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Feed aggregation and Go Order the regression proof · Debug Feed Go Pause Resume

content.text: A debug Go team handles case 2690 during a cross-tenant privacy audit. Build deterministic Go evidence to prove persisted due state, injected clocks, adaptive backoff, jitter, pause, and non-overlap; untrusted XML and feed content must not cross admission or rendering boundaries; then change one RSS, Atom, namespace, date, identity, content, or encoding case and reconcile provenance. Browser Go uses pure bounded models and original RSS, Atom, HTTP, PostgreSQL, and reader fixtures only. Real DNS, sockets, XML libraries, PostgreSQL, processes, signals, race, load, containers, accessibility review, backups, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Make manual, policy, repeated-failure, deletion, and incident pauses explicit, authorized, observable, and safely resumable.

lines.text: Setting next_fetch_at to NULL explains every pause reason.

lines.label: required
lines.text: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Make manual, policy, repeated-failure, deletion, and incident pauses explicit, authorized, observable, and safely resumable.

options.text: Another successful run of the same happy-path example. That claim does not survive the feed go pause resume · fault isolation evidence boundary.

For feed go pause resume · fault isolation, import one convenient trusted RSS feed, omit reader and publisher outcomes, revision, discovery and SSRF scope, Atom and namespace cases, XML and HTTP budgets, PostgreSQL constraints and transaction, schedule, lease, goroutine cleanup, tenant, accessibility, recovery, and controlled native transfer, then accept plausible rows as feed-service proof.
A minimal trace that preserves the preconditions, contradicts the misconception, and satisfies Feed Go Pause Resume.

steps.title: Feed aggregation and Go Implement the cause-level repair · Debug Feed Go Pause Resume
steps.instruction:
Append a compile-ready pure-Go function headed "// Evidence: feed-go-pause-resume-9uqplj" that uses case 5712 to prove persisted due state, injected clocks, adaptive backoff, jitter, pause, and non-overlap. Return observable changed-case evidence. Browser code must not open sockets, resolve DNS, parse through native XML libraries, contact publishers, access PostgreSQL, read host files, handle real signals, launch unbounded goroutines, or claim race, load, accessibility, container, backup, restore, or production behavior; verify those boundaries later with Go 1.26.5, pgx 5.10.0, goose 3.27.2, PostgreSQL 18.4, original fixtures, controlled RoundTrippers and httptest servers, disposable databases, race and fuzz runs, subprocesses, inspected images, accessibility review, capacity, backup, restore, rollback, and release gates.

Evidence target: Feed aggregation and Go Implement the cause-level repair · Debug Feed Go Pause Resume.
steps.why: Building a runnable or mechanically reviewable artifact turns Feed Go Pause Resume into observable performance evidence. For Feed aggregation and Go Implement the cause-level repair · Debug Feed Go Pause Resume, keep Feed Go Pause Resume connected to executable Go feed, XML, HTTP, PostgreSQL, schedule, API, reader, deployment, and recovery decision evidence.

content.caption: Shape of the required increment; replace generic language with the current stakeholder case.

content.title: Evidence is more than syntax
content.text: The structural check is only one gate. The following changed-case decision and explanation must also hold.

hints: For Feed aggregation and Go Implement the cause-level repair · Debug Feed Go Pause Resume, name the reader, publisher, revision, Go, source, tenant, URL, feed format, XML, HTTP, PostgreSQL, transaction, lease, goroutine, API, accessibility, recovery, and native-transfer boundary, Feed Go Pause Resume precondition, or invariant that must hold.

At Feed aggregation and Go Implement the cause-level repair · Debug Feed Go Pause Resume, trace this concrete input and predict values, errors, blocking, and output before reviewing it: A debug Go team handles case 8643 during an isolated backup restore exercise. Build deterministic Go evidence to prove persisted due state, injected clocks, adaptive backoff, jitter, pause, and non-overlap; publisher fetch and retention budgets must remain explicit; then change one artifact, deployment, incident, backup, restore, rollback, or capacity condition and reconcile the release. Browser Go uses pure bounded models and original RSS, Atom, HTTP, PostgreSQL, and reader fixtures only. Real DNS, sockets, XML libraries, PostgreSQL, processes, signals, race, load, containers, accessibility review, backups, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Make manual, policy, repeated-failure, deletion, and incident pauses explicit, authorized, observable, and safely resumable.

For Feed aggregation and Go Implement the cause-level repair · Debug Feed Go Pause Resume, challenge the documented misconception with runtime, failure, race, or toolchain evidence: Setting next_fetch_at to NULL explains every pause reason.

steps.title: Feed aggregation and Go Publish the incident record · Debug Feed Go Pause Resume
steps.instruction:
Write the debug evidence note for Feed Go Pause Resume: explain the governing condition, one failure, and how this concrete case was verified — A debug Go team handles case 7738 during an accessible community-news reader review. Build deterministic Go evidence to prove persisted due state, injected clocks, adaptive backoff, jitter, pause, and non-overlap; browser Go must remain deterministic and free of network, database, process, and host effects; then inject one URL, DNS, redirect, compression, entity, depth, timeout, or publisher-budget failure and reject it safely. Browser Go uses pure bounded models and original RSS, Atom, HTTP, PostgreSQL, and reader fixtures only. Real DNS, sockets, XML libraries, PostgreSQL, processes, signals, race, load, containers, accessibility review, backups, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Make manual, policy, repeated-failure, deletion, and incident pauses explicit, authorized, observable, and safely resumable.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Make manual, policy, repeated-failure, deletion, and incident pauses explicit, authorized, observable, and safely resumable.
